title: Chemical Equipment Operators and Tenders
description: Operate or tend equipment to control chemical changes or reactions in the processing of industrial or consumer products. Equipment used includes devulcanizers, steam-jacketed kettles, and reactor vessels.

tasks.text: Observe safety precautions to prevent fires or explosions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Record operational data, such as temperatures, pressures, ingredients used, processing times, or test results.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Control or operate equipment in which chemical changes or reactions take place during the processing of industrial or consumer products.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Patrol work areas to detect leaks or equipment malfunctions or to monitor operating conditions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Draw samples of products at specified stages so that analyses can be performed.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Adjust controls to regulate temperature, pressure, feed, or flow of liquids or gases and times of prescribed reactions, according to knowledge of equipment and processes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Monitor gauges, recording instruments, flowmeters, or products to ensure that specified conditions are maintained.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Test product samples for specific gravity, chemical characteristics, pH levels, concentrations, or viscosities, or send them to laboratories for testing.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inspect equipment or units to detect leaks or malfunctions, shutting equipment down, if necessary.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Open valves or start pumps, agitators, reactors, blowers, or automatic feed of materials.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Read plant specifications to determine products, ingredients, or prescribed modifications of plant procedures.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Implement appropriate industrial emergency response procedures.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Measure, weigh, and mix chemical ingredients, according to specifications.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Dump or scoop prescribed solid, granular, or powdered materials into equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Notify maintenance engineers of equipment malfunctions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Estimate materials required for production and manufacturing of products.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Add treating or neutralizing agents to products, and pump products through filters or centrifuges to remove impurities or to precipitate products.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Observe and compare colors and consistencies of products to instrument readings and to laboratory and standard test results.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Direct activities of workers assisting in control or verification of processes or in unloading of materials.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Drain equipment, and pump water or other solutions through to flush and clean tanks or equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Flush or clean equipment, using steam hoses or mechanical reamers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Make minor repairs, lubricate, and maintain equipment, using hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inventory supplies received and consumed.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
